title: Meet Your Candidate
script: Hello, I will be your proctor today. My name is [your name]. You can send me a message via chat or use the audio feature if you need me immediately.
purpose: Introduces the proctor and explains how the candidate can ask for help.

title: Remain in Camera View
script: Please ensure your head to shoulders always remain in the camera view.
purpose: Sets the candidate's camera-position expectation before testing.

title: Certifying Statement
script: Please read your Certifying Statement out loud and acknowledge it upon exam launch.
purpose: Ensures the required statement is completed as the exam begins.

title: VPN Detected
script: A VPN connection has been detected. You are unable to begin your test because VPN use is strictly prohibited. Kindly log out and close the browser, disconnect from the VPN, then log back into Prometric once your VPN is disconnected.
purpose: Guides the candidate through disconnecting a VPN before testing.

title: Restricted Testing Region
script: Your IP address indicates that you are located outside of an approved testing region. Testing from your current location is not permitted. Please contact LSAC for rescheduling options.
purpose: Explains why a candidate blocked by regional IP controls cannot test.

title: Return from Break
script: You will be checked back in before you continue with your exam, which will include a full security scan.
purpose: Prepares the candidate for the required check-in after a break.

title: Room Scan
script: Please slowly move your webcam clockwise around your room to show me the four corners of your ceiling. Now, please slowly move your webcam clockwise around your room to show me your walls.
purpose: Directs a consistent room scan during check-in.

title: Finish the Session
script: Thank you for testing with us today. Please make sure you exit the application before leaving the camera view.
purpose: Closes the session while keeping the candidate visible until exit.
